entry.title: What choice?
entry.summary:
Author: Writingall

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,363Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 108

Summary: Reader meets the Waynes in unexpected ways? Some planed-as much as you can plan meeting a billionare and one after the other all his Sons- as well as the Kents, well at least the super ones.Something sparks, some things burn and some things healWhat's meant to happen, will happen.What belongs togehter, will find togehter.(I suck at summarys, english is not my first language! Please just read)Will include- Thresome- One Night Stand- Unprotected sexAlso I am very new to Batman and Superman Universes, so have mercy on me!NOTHING HERE IS CANON, EXPECT CHAOS!

entry.title: Come As You Are
entry.summary:
Author: everyonethinkstoomuch

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,302Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 184

Summary: 'Bruce was only watching to see how Clark’s sparring was coming along... He wasn’t watching Clark because he liked him or found him attractive. That would be foolish, and not sensible at all, and a distraction from the more important things in life, like beating up criminals every night and passing his exams.'When Clark Kent gets into yet another fight on a night out, his friend Diana suggests he joins the university boxing club to get used to fighting back, without killing someone with his superpowers. Bruce Wayne has just transferred to Metropolis City University and isn’t all too happy about it. Unlike everyone else he knows, he misses Gotham. And now he has to balance university, being Batman, and his feelings for Clark Kent - which he definitely doesn’t have.CONTENT WARNINGS: a little bit of swearing, implied abuse, implied & described mild violence, lots of discussion of dead parents.This is an AU drawing on several different versions of characters and also my own interpretation of them. Bruce is Battinson, Clark is Corensupes & Smallville. The others are a mix of all media types and kind of just what I want them to be!

entry.title: Save a horse (ride a cowboy)
entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,345Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 573

Summary: A small mistake that involved burning down of mayor's family yacht, lands city boy Bruce Wayne in his aunt's small town ranch in Texas where he's disciplined by the dust in his lungs, blisters on his hands and a cowboy, who makes him forget why he ever wanted to leave in the first place.

entry.title: Hiding with the animals
entry.summary:
Author: Dev_Hum4n

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,298Chapters: 2/20Kudos: 1

Summary: In a world where hybrids are known of—but never truly seen—Bruce Wayne never expected one to be so close to home. As secrets begin to surface, he’s forced to confront a hidden truth: the people he loves most may not be entirely human. And in Gotham, being different has never been safe. Therefore, he must try and protect them from everything they’ve been through, even though he knows it’s going to be extremely difficult.

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,544Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 55

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore. i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,229Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 55

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Childhood Friends

entry.title: Cryptomnesia
entry.summary:
Author: superguyfan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,383Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 21

Summary: “Uh hi! Apologies for the intrusion, I’m Clark Kent with the Daily Planet, I just wanted to know if you might give me a quote on the van that attempted to run you and your colleagues over.” “Looks like you pretty much got the gist of it. I gotta thank you for the school teacher cover, it’s giving me an excuse to leave right now.” Clark gave a bewildered look as if he was trying to feign ignorance. “Drop the act. I may have almost been run over but that doesn’t mean I lost my eyes and ears in the process. A school teacher calling a hospital? Really?” Clark fixed his glasses, a small chuckle escaping his lips. “It’s true what they say then, you’re pretty good.” “Not sure if I would call doing my job ‘pretty good,’ but that’s why you’re the reporter and I’m the detective. Now if you’ll excuse me...” Bruce Wayne has it all: a solid career, a family fortune, but what happens when a huge conspiracy falls right into his lap and he suddenly finds himself in a load of trouble and no one but a rookie reporter to help him out?

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,108Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 45

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

entry.title: Exclusive
entry.summary:
Author: wisteriaglow

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,543Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 311

Summary: Newly single and in an odd place since the breakup, Clark is dragged by Lois to Gotham's most glamorous party. He expects to feel out of place and awkwardly get by, not to steal a kiss from Gotham's resident elusive billionaire, Bruce Wayne. Sparks fly and what starts off as a fling spirals into something more...but nothing is as easy as it seems, especially when Metropolis' resident billionaire is working hard to get his fiancée back. OR Clark and Bruce start something after connecting one night at a party, but Lex doesn't let go so easily.

entry.title: Love Me For Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,723Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Bruce Wayne died destroying a Xenomorph Queen. Clark Kent mourned him with Kryptonian ritual and carried the key to the Batcave against his sternum for nine days. Then Jason Todd brought Bruce back. Resurrection via Lazarus Pit is never clean. Bruce returns with his memories intact and a rage that displaces every other emotion. The two-meter distance that kept Clark alive in the hive becomes the boundary that keeps Bruce from violence. The team fractures over the ethics of resurrection without consent. And in the Pacific Northwest, something new is hunting—parasitic neural infiltrators that enter through the ear canal and leave their hosts conscious during control. Bruce volunteers as bait. Clark shadows him every meter. The key stays cold against Clark's chest. And somewhere in the Cascade Range, a Yautja marks Batman as worthy prey. "You were wrong to do it. But I'm glad you did." Love that persists despite impossibility. Love that consumes despite resistance. Love that exists in darkness and is overcome by forces larger than itself. This is what remains.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Parent Trap
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,549Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 57

Summary: When Dick Grayson forces Clark to pretend to be his parent for a meeting with his headmaster, Clark expects an awkward conversation and maybe a lecture from Bruce afterward. He does not expect Gotham’s tabloids to decide he and Bruce Wayne are secretly together. But after one too many headlines about Bruce Wayne’s “mysterious co-parent,” pretending to date starts seeming like the easiest solution. That would probably be less of a problem if Clark wasn’t already half in love with him.

entry.title: Second time is the charm
entry.summary:
Author: Emelian65

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,354Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 360

Summary: Clark wakes up in his bed, feeling strange. He had vivid dreams of a cataclysmic future. He sits up, tries to shake it off, but the memories are too detailed, overwhelming. He remembers the world ending, heroes falling, his own death? But then he's alive, young. He checks the date... It's now 2011, several years in the past.

entry.title: At One Hundred Percent
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,105Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 61

Summary: After an injury on patrol, Clark refuses to sleep with Bruce until he's "back to one hundred percent." Bad move. Bruce decides to show Clark exactly how petty Batman can be by enforcing a strict, agonizingly sexy "no touching the patient" rule for four straight days. Clark can handle the vacuum of space, but can he survive a smug, scantily-clad billionaire who refuses to be hugged?

entry.title: billion dollar man
entry.summary:
Author: sillybob24

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,940Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 44

Summary: “He’s Bruce Wayne,” says a lady, her whisper barely audible, and why do unarmed people want to speak up when there’s loaded guns near? “Bruce Wayne? From Gotham?” the security guard asks, scooting closer to Bruce on the marble floor. “Is there another?” he asks snootily. Excuse him, but he had his face shoved against a hard floor, a bullet shot into him, and now he’s entertaining discussion in what should be a very traumatic experience for the group around him. In a way, he knows this is a helpful exercise, but for both his and their wellbeing, he needs to think a plan out. “Yes, I am a billionaire from Gotham.” Or, to be more painfully detailed, he’s a billionaire from Gotham caught up in a bank robbery.

entry.title: Who the hell is Nightwing?
entry.summary:
Author: acebagle

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,567Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 455

Summary: "I would like to propose Nightwing. He is an-" "No." Batman interjected. "Batman, if you would allow me to finish my nomination then we may move on to the discussion." Diana said. "No. Nightwing will not be joining the Justice League." Batman stated, with a rigidity to his shoulders that Hal had rarely seen outside of a crisis. --- When Nightwing joins the Justice League Hal Jordan doesn't know what to make of him. Despite his easy-going personality Hal can sense deeper troubles underneath the surface and with his identity as secretive as Batman's its hard to get a clear picture. He seems to know far too much about their local Bat and is far to intimate to be 'just friends' with Roy. Or seven times Hal Jordan is confused about Nightwing's relationship with his fellow League members and one time that he understands.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Dick Grayson & Bruce Wayne
  • Dick Grayson/Roy Harper
  • Dick Grayson & Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)

  • Roy Harper & Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)

entry.title: Six Times You Called My True Name
entry.summary:
Author: Cabbage1995

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,597Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 37

Summary: Names carry weight, but for Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent, they define the boundaries of their universe. Through four pivotal moments, the name Kal-El shifts from a weapon of anger to a sacred sanctuary. Follow their journey from a furious confrontation aboard the Watchtower after a reckless stunt, to the breathless, quiet intimacy of a rainy night in Gotham. Experience the devastating terror when the Dark Knight falls in battle and whispers a final prayer into the dark, the stubborn, domestic chaos of a painful recovery at Wayne Manor, and finally, the breathtaking moment amidst the ice crystals of the Fortress of Solitude where Bruce strips away every mask to ask a god to be his husband.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Idiots in Love
